query: SELECT name, yieldPercentage FROM final_recipes WHERE CAST(yieldPercentage AS DECIMAL) < 10 OR CAST(yieldPercentage AS DECIMAL) > 100; SELECT DISTINCT supplier FROM ingredients WHERE supplier IS NOT NULL AND supplier != '' ORDER BY supplier; SELECT name FROM suppliers ORDER BY name; SELECT COUNT(*) as no_supplier FROM ingredients WHERE supplier IS NULL OR supplier = '' OR supplier = 'Non specificato'
